---
title: "Stephen Snyder"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-header">
  <img src="https://schf-org.github.io/schf/people/synder-stephen/avatar.png"
       alt="Stephen Snyder" class="profile-avatar">
  <div class="profile-meta">
    <h1>Stephen Snyder</h1>
    <p class="profile-title">
      Fulbright Fellow and Researcher<br>
      Institute of Art History and Theory · Tbilisi State University<br>
      Visiting Assistant Professor · Bogazici University
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

Ph.D. Philosophy · Saint Louis University · 2006

<!-- Add bio and course links here -->
